name: procatchem-lua-api-docs
description: Redoc documentation site for PROCatchem Lua Script API, including notification and PC storage helpers.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp openapi.yaml dist/openapi.yaml && cp robots.txt dist/robots.txt && cp sitemap.xml dist/sitemap.xml && mkdir -p dist/examples && cp examples/*.lua dist/examples/
scripts.build:bundle: mkdir -p dist && redocly build-docs openapi.yaml -o dist/index.html
